steps.t: Laerdan is in Gath Forthnír. Lorniel suggested you seek out an Elf named Laerdan in hopes of learning what Raghnall's scroll would reveal.
Elrond Halfelven is at Rivendell in the Trollshaws. Laerdan, also unable to translate the scroll, sent you to Rivendell to speak with Elrond Halfelven…
